bull.b: Management continues to evaluate costs judiciously, finding a healthy baseline with potential for further reductions.
The recovery remains on track for Direct Digital Holdings, with a decent beginning in the first quarter.

bear.b: There is a little bit of extra worry as the scale event is expected in the second half, where visibility is unclear.
4Q24 revenue of $9.1 million was a bit worse than anticipated, as macro trends caught up with Direct, creating an incredibly challenging environment.
